title: Cybercraft2069 Server
body:
# Cyberpunk MMO Server

- **Fingerprint to join: 02665744615f9bee5a6043f545e5bb7d415383aa224c18e04521e9ddd1a0dc5**
- **Remember to increase your RAM allocation to 8GB or your game will crash**

Players start low in Linefield City by doing gigs and climb up social ladder to manage their own districts. We features many jobs that players can choose from with varities of transportations that players can upgrade over time.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/50xNXWvCduQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



Here are some jobs and features:
- Replicants hunting,
- Metros system,
- Apartments for rent,
- Restaurant job,
- Plants farming job,
- Delivery job,
- Flying cars,
- Automobility cars,
- Fishing job,
- TACZ guns,
- Tv,  Advertisement boards, projectors,
- Dancing Joi hologram



Shaders and Resourcepack used: Nostalgia and Patrix texture. Shader settings is included in Modpack.


### Come and explore the city, start your first gig and you might make it big one day!
